task: Migrate MidpointX to Local Plugins & MCP

key_patterns_discovered: Vertex AI unified SDK (@@google/genai) transparently accepts local API credentials without massive refactoring.
vertexRagStore tool limits architecture portability and requires custom fallback retrieval methods.
Markdown formatting for agent core skills is superior to programmatic TypeScript injection because it cleanly separates Cognitive Guidelines (MD) from Programmatic Tool Execution (MCP)
corrections: Re-architected the Local Skills Plugin system to parse YAML frontmatter from .md files instead of using JS classes.
